svg.title: Inferno Jockey – Suggested Game Architecture
svg.desc: Structural architecture diagram showing the major systems of the Inferno Jockey game, organised into five layers: Entry, Core Managers, Gameplay Systems, Data & Persistence, and UI.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GameBootstrapper for Inferno Jockey')
g.text: Init managers, load save, set scene
